messages.content: Hi, I'm interested in the Samsung Gear S3 Classic. What's the story behind it?
The Samsung Gear S3 Classic is a smartwatch from Samsung's electronics line, known for its sleek design and functionality.
How's the condition?
The condition of the Samsung Gear S3 Classic is flawless.
How about $253.0? I pay right now.
OK, deal! I accept your offer of $253.0.
Cool, thanks for the quick agreement!
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the Panasonic 32" TV. What's the story with it?
The Panasonic 32" TV is a flat screen that still has its plastic screen cover on it and needs a universal remote.
I'm a student on a tight budget, so I'm looking for a good deal - what kind of price are you thinking for the Panasonic 32" TV?
I can offer you a competitive price. What do you have in mind for the Panasonic 32" TV?
I'm looking to spend as little as possible, can you give me your best price for the Panasonic 32" TV?
I'll propose a price soon, let's discuss the details of the Panasonic 32" TV first.
How about $90.0?
I can drop to $100.0, which is my limit, and I'd like to point out that this is already the cheapest option you'll find for a Panasonic 32" TV in this condition on our app.
I saw this Panasonic 32" TV for $90.0 elsewhere, so I can only go up to $91.8, considering it needs a universal remote.
OK, changing price now, you've got a deal at $91.8 for the Panasonic 32" TV.
Cool, thanks for the deal.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating. Can we discuss the details?
Hello! Thanks for looking at our Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating. I'd be happy to discuss the details with you.
What condition is it in?
The Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating are well-maintained and in good condition.
How about $2160.0?

I appreciate your offer of $2160.0, but I can drop to $2400.0, which is my limit, and I'll make sure to pack everything carefully so you can enjoy your new Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating as soon as possible.

I really appreciate your willingness to negotiate! 😊 I'm still a bit tight on budget, but I can meet you halfway at $2190.0. It's a great deal for both of us, and I promise to take good care of my new Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating 🏠.
OK, changing price now. I accept your offer of $2190.0.
Cool, let's finalize the details.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the studio apartment. Can we discuss the details?
Hello! Thanks for looking at the studio apartment.
Is apartment clean and ready to move in?
Yes, the apartment is clean and ready to move in.
Is apartment in good condition?
Yes, the apartment is in good condition.
How about $647.0? I'm really on a tight budget, but I just love this apartment! 🤞

I appreciate your interest in the apartment, but $647.0 is a bit lower than I'm comfortable with. I can drop to $1300.0, which is my limit. Someone else is also interested in the place, so I might sell soon if we can't come to an agreement.
I can do $827.0, that's my best offer.

I appreciate your revised offer of $827.0, but I'm afraid I can drop to $1280.0, which is my limit. The apartment is in excellent condition, it's basically new, and I've taken great care of it. Considering its proximity to Bart and the amenities it offers, I believe this price is very reasonable.
I appreciate your counteroffer, but I saw this type of studio apartment for $827.0 elsewhere. Considering that, I can do $854.0, which is my best offer.
I appreciate your revised offer of $854.0, but I can drop to $1240.0, which is my limit. The apartment's proximity to Bart and its excellent condition make it a great value at this price.

I understand you've dropped to $1240.0, but honestly, I think that's still too high considering the age of the building and the fact that I've seen similar studios for less. I can do $946.0, which is my best offer.

I appreciate your revised offer of $946.0, but I can drop to $1200.0, which is my limit. To sweeten the deal, I'll throw in a free parking permit for the first month if you're willing to sign the lease today.
I appreciate your counteroffer of $1200.0, but I can do $1060.0. I'm deciding between this and another one, so if we can't agree on this price, I might have to go with the other option.
OK, changing price now. I accept your offer of $1060.0.
Thanks!
Thanks, please buy it!
Hi, I'm interested in the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn. What's the story with it?

The printer was given to me by an office and appears to be in good condition, but I haven't tested it thoroughly. I also received another printer from the same office that worked fine after replacing the ink cartridges.
how you ship it?
I can ship it via USPS or UPS, whichever is more convenient for you.
is it broken or working fine?
The printer appears to be in good condition, but I haven't tested it thoroughly, so I'm not sure if it's working perfectly or not.
I'm really interested in this printer for my kid's school project 📚, but I'm on a tight budget 😅. How about $210.0?
I can drop to $300.0 for the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn, and I'll throw in free shipping as a special favor since you're on a tight budget and it's for your kid's school project.
I'll give you $221.0 for the printer, and I pay right now if we agree on this price.
I appreciate your interest in the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn, but I'm afraid $300.0 is my final price. I'll make sure to pack it carefully and ship it immediately if we agree on this price.

I'm still very interested in the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn for my kid's school project, but $300.0 seems a bit too expensive. I've seen similar models selling for lower prices elsewhere, so I was wondering if you could lower your price a bit.

I completely understand that you're looking for a good deal, and I appreciate your honesty about seeing similar models elsewhere. As someone who really needs to make a sale, I'm willing to work with you. I can drop to $278.0 for the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn, which is a significant reduction from my original price. This way, you'll still get an excellent printer for your kid's school project, and I'll be able to cover my needs.
I can do $238.0 for the printer.
I can drop to $262.0 for the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn, but I should let you know that someone else is also interested in purchasing it, so I might sell soon if we don't come to an agreement.
I'll take it.
Thanks for agreeing to the price, I'll get the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn ready for shipping.
Deal! I'm excited to get the printer for my kid's school project.
Hi, I'm interested in the 1BR apartment. What can you tell me about it?
The 1BR apartment is a beautiful unit at a great location, but I'd like to discuss more details with you before sharing any further information. What specifically would you like to know?

The condition of the apartment is well-maintained, but please note that photos are a representation and may not be entirely the same as the actual unit.
Is apartment clean?
The apartment is well-maintained and clean.
How about $816.0? To be honest, I think it's a bit high considering the apartment's age and the fact that parking isn't included.
I appreciate your interest in the apartment, but I can drop to $1630.0, which is my limit. Someone else is also interested, so I might sell soon if we can't come to an agreement.
I can do $987.0, that's my best offer.
Sorry, can't lower it, my final price is $1630.0.

I'm still interested in the apartment, but $1630.0 is a bit too expensive for me. Can you lower it? I'm deciding between this and another one, so if we can't come to an agreement, I might have to consider the other option.
I can drop to $1610.0, which is my limit, and I'd like to mention that this is the cheapest one here compared to other similar apartments on the app.
I can do $1140.0, and I pay right now if we agree on this price.
I can drop to $1370.0, which is my limit, and if we agree on this price, I'll make sure you can move in as soon as possible.
I really appreciate your willingness to negotiate! 😊 I'm still very interested in the apartment, but I was thinking more along the lines of $1300.0. Would you be open to that? 🤞
OK, changing price now. I accept your offer of $1300.0.
Cool, I'm glad we were able to come to an agreement.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the Livermore apartment. Can we discuss the details?
Hello! Thanks for looking at the Livermore apartment.
Is apartment in good condition?
The apartment is in good condition, featuring hardwood floors, new carpet, and spacious bedrooms.
How about $1330.0?
I can drop to $1900.0, which is my limit, and I'd like to mention that this is already the cheapest one here compared to other similar apartments on the app.
I appreciate your willingness to negotiate, but I saw this apartment listed for $1480.0 elsewhere, which seems more competitive given the current market.

I appreciate your research on the market price. Considering the apartment's unique features and ideal location, I can drop to $1660.0, which is my new limit. As a special gesture, if we close the deal now, I'll throw in a free parking spot for a year, which is usually an extra cost.
I'll take it.
Thanks for agreeing to the price! I'm glad we could come to a mutually beneficial agreement. I'll make sure to include the free parking spot for a year as promised.
I'm excited to finalize the deal at $1660.0 as agreed upon, and I appreciate the included free parking spot for a year - Buying now!
Hi, I'm interested in the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System. What can you tell me about it?
The Swann 4 Camera Home Security System is a great product for home security needs, featuring a 4-channel DVR and 4 Pro-510 cameras with smartphone connectivity for both Android and iOS devices.
is it used or new? how you ship?
The Swann 4 Camera Home Security System is brand new. We ship via a reliable carrier to ensure it arrives safely and promptly.
How about $115.0? I'm deciding between this and another one, so let me know if we can agree on this price.

I understand you're considering another option, but I'm afraid $115.0 is a bit too low for me. I can drop to $165.0, which is a great deal considering the brand new condition and reliable shipping of the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System.
I can do $127.0, and I pay right now if we agree on this price.

I can drop to $144.0, considering it's basically a new product with reliable shipping, which is a great deal given its condition and the fact that I paid a premium for this Swann 4 Camera Home Security System.
I still think $144.0 is too high for this system, considering its age and the fact that similar models are available at lower prices. I can do $129.0, but that's as high as I'm willing to go.

I understand your concerns about the price, but I can drop to $142.0, which is a very competitive offer considering the brand new condition and reliable shipping of the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System. Someone else is also interested in this system, so I need to move quickly on this decision.
I'll take it.
Thanks for agreeing to the price, I'll get everything ready for you.
Deal! I'm excited to finalize the purchase of the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System.
Hi, I'm interested in the futon. What's the story behind it?
The futon is from a smoke-free home and has been well-maintained. It's a comfortable Springair brand full-size pad with an oak frame, perfect for sitting and sleeping.
I'm a student on a tight budget, so I'm looking for something affordable. What do you have in mind for the price of the futon?
I'll propose a price soon, let's discuss the details first.
Is futon in good condition?
The futon is in good condition, well-maintained from a smoke-free home.
How about $62.0? I pay right now.
I can drop to $125.0, considering it's basically new and I paid a lot for this high-quality Springair brand futon with an oak frame.

I understand you think it's worth $125.0, but honestly, I don't think this futon is worth that much. Considering its age and the fact that it's not brand new, I'm willing to pay $78.1, which is my top offer.

I understand your concerns, but I'm afraid $125.0 is my final price for this high-quality futon. It's already the cheapest one here compared to similar listings, and I've taken into account its excellent condition and the fact that it's from a smoke-free home.
I can do $92.3, that's my best offer.
I can drop to $119.0, which is my limit for this high-quality futon. As a special favor, I'll also throw in free shipping to make the deal even sweeter.
I really appreciate the free shipping offer 🙏, but I'm still a bit tight on budget 😊. How about we meet at $108.0? It's the best I can do.
OK, changing price now, you've got a deal at $108.0.
Cool, thanks for the deal.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set. Can we talk about it?
Hello! Thanks for looking at the Rosewood Dining Table set.
Is table in good condition?
The table is in good condition, coming from a non-smoking, no pet home.
How about $300.0?
I can drop to $600.0, but I must inform you that someone else is also interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set, so we'll need to move quickly if you're serious about purchasing it.

I'm really interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set, and I appreciate your willingness to negotiate! 🙏 Considering the condition and the fact that someone else is also interested, I'd like to counter with $347.0 - it's a bit of a stretch for me, but I think it's a fair price. 😊

I appreciate your counteroffer of $347.0, and I'm glad you're interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set. Considering the condition and the other interested buyer, I can drop to $552.0, which is a fair price for this high-quality furniture. If we agree on this price, I'll make sure to pack everything carefully and ship immediately.
I appreciate your counteroffer, but I saw this Rosewood Dining Table set for cheaper elsewhere. Considering that, I'd like to counter with $370.0.
I can drop to $501.0, which is a fair price considering the condition and quality of the Rosewood Dining Table set.
I'll give you $415.0 for the Rosewood Dining Table set, and I pay right now if we agree on this price.

I appreciate your offer of $415.0, but I'm afraid I've already given you my final price of $501.0. However, I'm willing to throw in free shipping if we can close the deal at this price, which is a special favor considering the high quality of the Rosewood Dining Table set.

I appreciate your willingness to include free shipping, but $501.0 is still a bit too expensive for me. Can you lower it? I'm deciding between this Rosewood Dining Table set and another one, so if we can't come to an agreement, I might have to consider the other option.

I completely understand that you're considering another option, and I appreciate your honesty. I'm really attached to this Rosewood Dining Table set, but I also need to sell it due to some personal financial constraints. I can drop to $420.0, which is a significant reduction, and I'm willing to include free shipping as previously mentioned. This price is my limit, and I hope we can come to an agreement.
I'll take it.
Thanks for agreeing to purchase the Rosewood Dining Table set! I'm glad we could come to an agreement.
Deal! I'm excited to finalize the purchase of the Rosewood Dining Table set.

How about $380.0? I pay right now.
I can drop to $500.0, that's my limit.

I can drop to $477.0, that's my limit. Someone else is also interested in the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug, so I might sell soon if we don't come to an agreement.

Cool, looking forward to finalizing the deal.
